description: Email mentions farmer-pay stat $3.80/kg and the $130B grocery market size — both are whitelisted contexts, should pass ADV-002.
text:
Hi friend,

A quick story to share before our raise.

One of our partner growers in the Hawkesbury sells us heritage carrots at $3.80/kg — almost double the gate price the major chains were paying him last summer. That extra margin is what kept his soil-restoration program going through winter.

This is the story we want to scale. Australian groceries are a $130B market. We don't need a big slice to make a meaningful difference for regen growers — we just need a model that pays them properly and a community of customers who care.

Our CSF round opens on Birchal on 23 June 2026. If you've been waiting for a chance to back this idea, this is it.

With real risks involved — including loss of capital and inability to sell your shares for a long time — please read the offer document on Birchal before deciding.

Thanks,
Sarah
Co-founder & Director, FarmThru

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
